terms.definition: garments, clothes; material bodies as temporary coverings for the eternal soul; from vas (to wear)
worn out, old, decayed; material body after utility is exhausted; from jṝ (to decay)
having abandoned; voluntary relinquishment of worn-out form; from vi-ha (to leave)
the embodied one, the soul; distinct from the body itself; deha + ī (possessing)
accepts, enters into; soul's assumption of new embodiment per karma; from sam-yā
